name: bilibili-all-in-one
description: A comprehensive Bilibili toolkit that integrates hot trending monitoring, video downloading, video watching/playback, subtitle downloading, and video publishing capabilities into a single skill.
author: wscats

env_vars.name: BILIBILI_SESSDATA
env_vars.description: Bilibili SESSDATA cookie for authenticated API access. Only required for publishing and high-quality (1080p+/4K) downloads. Most features work without this.

env_vars.name: BILIBILI_BILI_JCT
env_vars.description: Bilibili bili_jct cookie (CSRF token) for write operations (upload, edit). Only required for publishing. Most features work without this.

env_vars.name: BILIBILI_BUVID3
env_vars.description: Bilibili buvid3 cookie for device identification in authenticated sessions.

env_vars.name: BILIBILI_PERSIST
env_vars.description: Set to '1', 'true', or 'yes' to enable automatic credential persistence. When enabled, credentials are saved to .credentials.json (0600 permissions) and auto-loaded on next startup. Default: disabled (in-memory only).

credentials.credential_required_for: Only the Publisher module (upload/edit/schedule/draft) and high-quality downloads (1080p+/4K) require credentials. All other features (hot monitoring, standard downloads, subtitles, danmaku, stats) work WITHOUT any credentials.
credentials.credential_scope_warning: These are full browser session cookies (not limited API keys). Providing them grants the skill broad access to your Bilibili account. Use a test/throwaway account.
credentials.storage: in-memory by default. Set persist=True (or env BILIBILI_PERSIST=1) to auto-save/load credentials from .credentials.json with 0600 permissions. Persistence can also be toggled at runtime via auth.persist property.
security_notes: Credentials are NOT persisted to disk by default. Persistence must be explicitly opted-in via persist=True or BILIBILI_PERSIST=1.
Prefer passing credentials via environment variables or in-memory parameters.
All API requests go to official Bilibili endpoints over HTTPS.
Use a test/throwaway Bilibili account for evaluation purposes.
These are full session cookies — treat them as highly sensitive. They grant broad account access, not just limited API scope.

skills.name: bilibili_hot_monitor
skills.description: Monitor Bilibili hot/trending videos and topics in real-time. Supports filtering by category, tracking rank changes, and sending notifications.

action.description: The action to perform: get_hot (hot videos), get_trending (trending topics), get_weekly (weekly must-watch), get_rank (category rankings)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

skills.name: bilibili_downloader
skills.description: Download Bilibili videos with support for multiple quality options, batch downloading, and format selection.

action.description: The action to perform: download (download a video), get_info (get video info), get_formats (list available formats), batch_download (download multiple videos)

url.description: Bilibili video URL or BV number (e.g., 'https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1xx411c7mD' or 'BV1xx411c7mD')

urls.description: List of Bilibili video URLs for batch download

skills.name: bilibili_watcher
skills.description: Watch and monitor Bilibili videos. Track view counts, comments, likes, and other engagement metrics over time.

action.description: The action to perform: watch (get video details), get_stats (get engagement stats), track (track video metrics over time), compare (compare multiple videos)

urls.description: List of video URLs for comparison

interval.description: Tracking interval in minutes (for track action)

duration.description: Tracking duration in hours (for track action)

skills.name: bilibili_subtitle
skills.description: Download and process subtitles/CC from Bilibili videos. Supports multiple subtitle formats and languages.

action.description: The action to perform: download (download subtitles), list (list available subtitles), convert (convert subtitle format), merge (merge multiple subtitle files)

url.description: Bilibili video URL or BV number

skills.name: bilibili_player
skills.description: Play Bilibili videos with support for playback control, playlist management, and danmaku (bullet comments) display.

action.description: The action to perform: play (play a video), get_playurl (get direct play URL), get_danmaku (get danmaku/bullet comments), get_playlist (get playlist info)

url.description: Bilibili video URL or BV number

skills.name: bilibili_publisher
skills.description: Publish videos to Bilibili. Supports uploading videos, setting metadata, scheduling publications, and managing drafts.

action.description: The action to perform: upload (upload and publish), draft (save as draft), schedule (schedule publication), edit (edit existing video)

file_path.description: Path to the video file to upload

schedule_time.description: Scheduled publish time (ISO 8601 format, for schedule action)

bvid.description: BV number of existing video (for edit action)

bilibili_sessdata.description: Bilibili SESSDATA cookie. Optional — only needed for publishing and 1080p+/4K downloads. Most features work without credentials.

bilibili_bili_jct.description: Bilibili bili_jct cookie (CSRF token). Optional — only needed for publishing (upload/edit). Most features work without credentials.

bilibili_buvid3.description: Bilibili buvid3 cookie for device identification. Optional.

network.description: HTTP/HTTPS requests to Bilibili official APIs

filesystem.description: Read/write access for downloading videos, subtitles, and uploading files
filesystem.note: Credential files are NEVER auto-created. save_to_file() must be explicitly called by the user.

activation_note: This skill should only be activated when the user explicitly requests Bilibili-related operations. It does NOT auto-activate on keyword/link detection.
